phrases.intent_en: Ask for a table on the terrace
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous une table en terrasse, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY-voo oon TAB-luh ahn teh-RASS, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Place Plumereau, known locally as 'la Place Plume', is the social heart of Vieux-Tours. Its cafés and restaurants fill the square with terrasse seating in warm weather.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a recommendation for a good terrace café
phrases.text_local: Vous pouvez me recommander un bon café en terrasse ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo poo-VAY muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY uhn bohn kah-FAY ahn tay-RASS
phrases.cultural_note: Place Plumereau is lined with café terraces in a beautiful medieval setting.

responses.english: All the cafés here have nice terraces.
responses.phonetic: too lay kah-FAY ee-SEE ohn duh BON tay-RASS
responses.french: Tous les cafés ici ont de bonnes terrasses.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the square is pedestrianised
phrases.cultural_note: Place Plumereau and the surrounding streets of Vieux-Tours are pedestrianised, making it one of the most pleasant areas to stroll in the city.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where I can find a local Touraine wine bar nearby
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un bar à vins avec des vins de Touraine dans les environs ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un BAR ah VAN ah-VEK day VAN duh too-REN dahn lay zahn-vee-RON
phrases.cultural_note: The streets behind Place Plumereau — Rue du Grand Marché and Rue de la Rôtisserie — are lined with wine bars specialising in Loire Valley appellations.

responses.english: There is one right on the corner.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah uhn ZHOOST oh KWAHN duh lah ROO
responses.french: Il y en a un juste au coin de la rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a street market on the square
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un marché sur la place le matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un mar-SHAY soor lah PLASS luh mah-TAN
phrases.cultural_note: A small morning market takes place near Place Plumereau on weekends. The main covered market, Les Halles de Tours, is a short walk away.

responses.english: The market is on Saturday morning.
responses.phonetic: luh mar-SHAY eh luh sam-DEE mah-TAHN
responses.french: Le marché est le samedi matin.
